case_title: AYINDE COLE VS. AMINATA JOAN LAGGER

docket_entries.description: FILE DESTROYED PER ORDER SIGNED BY JUDGE SAMUEL FENG ON 10/11/2022 PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 681.53.
ORDER CASE DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,250.00 FILED BY COLE, AYINDE AS TO DEFENDANT LAGGER, AMINATA JOAN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-19-2019 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF. NO APPEARANCES BY DEFENDANT. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)
COPYING FEES (10 PAGE) PAID BY PLAINTIFF COLE, AYINDE
ORDER RE: CONTINUE FOR PROOF OF SERVICE. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-19-2019 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO JUL-22-2019 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF AYINDE COLE IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT AMINATA JOAN LAGGER IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)
